title: DRW MD-DRW-531: Enhanced Antenna Mount
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-531 Rev A — Enhanced Antenna Mount

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1122, P-1123, P-1126, P-1133.
4. Drawn by Priya Nair, checked by Rowan Ellery, approved by Dr. Rhea Voss.
